State.Description: This mod completely reworks how equipment behaves on death. Weapons and shields drop naturally with momentum, stay sheathed when not drawn, and interact seamlessly with the environment. Equipment can be picked up directly from the ground. No scripts, no performance hit, just smarter, immersive combat dynamics.
State.Name: Death Drop Overhaul
